name: blocks-uilm
description: Languages, translation keys, AI auto-translation, import/export translation files, and Blocks Localization i18n setup

changes: Full contracts.md rewrite against actual Swagger API spec
Auth changed from Authorization: ApiKey to x-blocks-key header
Key operations now use moduleId (not moduleName); module operations use moduleName
Key structures use resources[] (not translations[]) with {value, culture, characterLength}
UilmImport uses fileId reference (not raw file upload)
GetKeyTimeline uses EntityId query param (not keyId)
Language/Delete uses LanguageName query param (not itemId)
Language model now includes isRTL field
Webhook structure updated to blocksWebhookSecret with secret and headerKey
